name: Sensata Technologies Holding plc
description: Sensata Technologies Holding plc is a global industrial technology company that develops, manufactures, and sells sensors, sensor-rich solutions, electrical protection components, and power management systems. The company provides mission-critical products for a wide range of applications in the automotive, industrial, and aerospace and defense markets. By creating valuable business insights through its sensing and control technologies, Sensata helps customers improve safety, efficiency, and performance. Headquartered in the United States, the company is incorporated in England and Wales and serves a diverse global customer base with innovative engineering solutions designed for complex, high-performance environments.
